name: Seega
author: AGP (traditional Egyptian/Nubian)
description: Seega, a traditional Egyptian/Nubian custodial-capture game. Phase 1: players alternately place two stones per turn on any empty cells except the centre, until the board is full but the centre. Phase 2: players step one stone orthogonally into an adjacent empty cell, capturing enemy stones flanked between two friendly stones (the centre is a safe square). Win by reducing the opponent below two stones or blockading them.
